This page is protected so that only users with the "autoconfirmed" permission can edit it.

Demonic Pacts League/Tasks

From Old School RuneScape Wiki
< Demonic Pacts League
Jump to navigation Jump to search
Demonic Pacts
Guides

This page will contain a list of all the tasks in the Demonic Pacts League. Completing tasks during the league allows players to earn league points and unlock relics and areas containing new content and tasks. Tasks span five difficulty levels: Easy, Medium, Hard, Elite, and Master. Completing a task requires its respective area to be unlocked, unless otherwise stated.

For a list of only tasks that grant Demonic Pact points click here.

Tasks per region are as follows:

AreaEasyMediumHardEliteMasterTotal tasksTotal points

Wilderness12243725310110000
